title: Self-evolving AI, robot fights, new GPT voice, new local image model, Gemma upgrade: AI NEWS
summary: A comprehensive AI news roundup covering over 20 recent releases including HiDream-O1 Image for image generation, Gemma 4 with multi-token prediction, GPT Realtime 2 for voice, AlphaEvolve for self-improving AI, and robotic control systems like Gene 26.5. The video showcases the breadth of current AI development across vision, language, audio, and robotics.
